calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Certain Assets
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Yvonne and Joanne Gomez, and Jose G. Urionaguena, Petitioners; Ben Howard, via Zoom, for Wells Fargo, N.A., Interested Party.

The court mentions the related case IN RE: The Estate of Daniel M. Gomez (PES-22-305424) set for hearing Nov-15-2022 and advises that it appears as though the relief sought in this matter should be sought in the related estate matter instead. Mr. Gruwell reports that the only reason that the estate matter was opened to provide notice of this matter and that the bank account has been frozen for two years. Mr. Gruwell advises that if the court is not inclined to grant Petitioner's probate trust petition on the grounds stated, Petitioners have also alleged a cause of action for declaratory relief and believe that the limited requested relief can and can be granted without the burden and expense of the entire probate process. Mr. Howard reports that his client has no objection to the instant petition but will only release funds with a court order. The court reconfirms its position as previously stated and adds that it appears as though the bank account is not a trust asset. Mr. Gruwell offers additional advocacy on behalf of the instant petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
